title: mod_md security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1:2.4.26-1.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-134496 - httpd: Apache HTTP Server: mod_md (ACME), unintended
  retry intervals (CVE-2025-55753)
full_text:
[1:2.4.26-1.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-134496 - httpd: Apache HTTP Server: mod_md (ACME), unintended
  retry intervals (CVE-2025-55753)

https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23739.html
